tagline: Turn leftovers into dinner, not waste.

designSystem.style: Dark-first food app with deep forest-green surfaces, vibrant emerald accent, urgency-coded item indicators (red/amber/green), and a rescue-mode-centric information hierarchy. Card-based layout with subtle gradient borders and high-contrast typography.

screens: Fridge (Home) - Live inventory grouped by category with urgency badges and expiring-items strip
Rescue - Recipe recommendations ranked by salvage score and perishability, with step-by-step cooking mode
Scan & Log - Three-mode item entry: camera recognition, receipt OCR, and manual add
Insights - Weekly rescue activity chart, savings tracker, fridge patterns, and household profile
Settings - User profile, household configuration, notifications, dietary preferences, and theme toggle
